note: Desired DNS state for docs (ADR-002). Observed public DNS may still point at GitHub Pages until PR9 cutover. This file is SSOT for verify ladder expectations — not a claim that cutover has happened.

records.comment: Plesk public IPv4 (same as subactor.com / prototypowanie.pl panel host). Confirmed 2026-07-18 via dig A subactor.com.

observed_public.interpretation: GitHub Pages — expected pre-PR9. Public publish-verify must fail (dns_mismatch / tls_san_mismatch).

observed_origin.https_root: 200 probe index.html on subdomain docroot (not prototypowanie.pl)
observed_origin.interpretation: Origin Host ready for fingerprint rehearsal. Public DNS still Pages — do not flip.

docs.subactor.com.observed_note: Public docs.subactor.com still GitHub Pages. Origin subdomain+probe marker exist. No production DNS flip until G0–G6 incl. cert HITL.

staging.purpose: Recommended origin/public rehearsal path before production cutover.

observed_public.interpretation: Public still Pages; Plesk subdomain id 309 exists on origin (default page until content uploaded).

staging.blocker: Upload rehearsal release to docs-stage origin; public staging DNS still HITL.

dns_emergency.note: HITL only; restores Pages, not previous Plesk release. TLS SAN still wrong for docs.subactor.com.

content.note: Only after a prior Plesk release exists; none observed on origin for docs hostname.

needs_human: Agree cert path (DNS-01 before cutover preferred) / issue LE with SAN docs.subactor.com (origin today: self-signed CN=Plesk).
HITL boundary DNS mutate Pages CNAME → A 217.160.250.222 only after G0–G6 green.
Optional: wire connector URI for subdomain/site add (rights already OK on subscription; ad-hoc XML used 2026-07-18).
Formal release-upload→activate (not only SFTP probe) + Cache-Control no-store on marker.
subscription_rights_note: Customer subactor_customer on webspace subactor.com: manage_subdomains=true, create_domains=true, max_subdom=-1. Panel login subactor XML auth failed 1001; mailbox agent@subactor.com XML denied 1006. Not a plan-limit blocker.
